title: Gmail node fails to read binary attachment
symptom: When attempting to send a PDF as an attachment via the Gmail node, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '0')'.
not_this_if: Binary data is correctly processed by the Gmail node
root_cause: The Gmail node expects a specific field name for attachments, and if the binary data is not correctly referenced or passed from previous nodes, it results in an undefined error when trying to access the data.
fix_steps: Use a Structured Output Parser tool to extract data from the AI Agent.
Wire the Merge node and Gmail node after the AI node to ensure the binary data is correctly attached.
agent_instruction: Implement a Structured Output Parser and connect the Merge and Gmail nodes appropriately to handle the binary data.
